info.title: Multi-Agent API
info.description: API with listing and markets agents

get.description:
Up to `limit` map pins: one row per building/property (closest unit to the query point),
within `radius_miles` when any inventory exists in that radius; otherwise nearest buildings
globally. Requires PostgreSQL, DATABASE_URL, LISTINGS_TABLE_NAME, latitude/longitude columns.

parameters.name: zip

schema.description: US ZIP; first 5 digits used (supports ZIP+4).
schema.title: Zip

parameters.description: US ZIP; first 5 digits used (supports ZIP+4).

parameters.name: address

schema.description: Deprecated fallback: extract ZIP from free-text only if zip/city/state are missing.
schema.title: Address

parameters.description: Deprecated fallback: extract ZIP from free-text only if zip/city/state are missing.

llamaCloudPipeline.description: The selected LlamaCloud pipeline to use for the chat

ChatRequest.title: ChatRequest
ChatRequest.description: The request to the chat API.

LlamaCloudPipeline.title: LlamaCloudPipeline
LlamaCloudPipeline.description:
The selected LlamaCloud pipeline to use for the chat.
(Only available when the app is configured to use LlamaCloud)

zip.title: Zip
zip.description: 5-digit US ZIP when the filter used postal code.

used_global_nearest_fallback.title: Used Global Nearest Fallback
used_global_nearest_fallback.description: True when nothing matched the radius; properties are the nearest rows with coordinates (any distance) so the map is still usable.

nearest_distance_meters.title: Nearest Distance Meters
nearest_distance_meters.description: Straight-line distance from the query pin to the nearest POI (meters).

city.title: City
city.description: City or locality from the listings row when present (e.g. units.parquet `city`).

state.title: State
state.description: State / region code from the listings row when present (e.g. units.parquet `state`).

zip_code.title: Zip Code
zip_code.description: Postal code from the listings row when present (e.g. units.parquet `zipcode`).

latitude.title: Latitude
latitude.description: Latitude of the property if available from the query results.

longitude.title: Longitude
longitude.description: Longitude of the property if available from the query results.

rent_range.title: Rent Range
rent_range.description: rent range from the units available with currency, e.g., $2000-$2500

bedroom_range.title: Bedroom Range
bedroom_range.description: bedroom range from the units available, e.g., 1-3 bedrooms

images_urls.title: Images Urls
images_urls.description: list of image URLs of the property

main_amenities.title: Main Amenities
main_amenities.description:
List of the four main amenities of the property, which should include things related to:
            - pool
            - Gym / Fitness center
            - Parking / Garage
            - Policies, e.g., pet friendly
            - Location features, e.g., waterfront, beach access
            - Building features, e.g., elevator, doorman

            Maximum of four items.
            It's important to keep the items concise and avoid full sentences.

amenities.title: Amenities
amenities.description: list of amenities available in the property

match_reason.title: Match Reason
match_reason.description: One short sentence (max ~200 chars) explaining why this listing matches the user's search (e.g. name/amenities mention 'park', proximity, filters applied).

message.title: Message
message.default: Check your email to verify your account.
